caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a casual studio or shop, as evidenced by the framed photographs on the wall behind him and clothing racks visible in the background. The man seems engaged in conversation, smiling and speaking into the microphone, suggesting an interactive and possibly humorous discussion. The environment is well-lit, and the overall atmosphere feels relaxed and informal.
